title: Internal Server Error
excerpt:
Hi, 
Am getting this error for last 30 mins or so. 
500 Internal Server Error

cloudflare

posts.author: priyadevelops (Priya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Am getting this error for last 30 mins or so.

500 Internal Server Error

cloudflare

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Priya - Mia here from the monday team thank you for flagging this! I definitely understand how frustrating those errors are.

We can confirm that the “500 Internal Server Error” and the reference to Cloudflare was due to a widespread third-party incident that occurred earlier this morning, but it has been fully resolved for several hours now!

If you are still seeing this, we highly recommend performing a hard refresh on your browser to ensure you are connected to the current, stable platform.

If the error persists after refreshing, please let me know so I can investigate your account directly!
